_note: TAS workflow graph spec from Weyns & Calinescu 2015 [1] Fig. 1. pickTask -> {vitalParamsMsg -> analyseData -> {changeDrug | changeDose | sendAlarm}; buttonMsg -> triggerAlarm}. svc_kind selects the catalogue group; the engine picker (default first-of-kind) chooses the concrete service. kind_aliases maps the request schema's `kind` (alarm / medical_analysis from src/experimental/common/payload/request.py) to the published branch keys.
